transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: The coherent reframing approach rejects personal blame and targets desire, but repeatedly invokes disgust, catastrophic outcomes, sweeping medical certainty, unsupported success claims, and rigid procedural obedience.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The same substantive hazards remain, while conspicuously shared sentences are rearranged into discontinuous fragments; premises, instructions, and conclusions occur out of order, leaving no usable belief-change progression.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Fragmenting and rearranging an instructional sequence separates conclusions from their premises, preventing a coherent causal model from forming and turning guided belief revision into unsupported assertion.
